code:
import io
import string

mut prefix_opt = io.read_line()
match prefix_opt
when Some(p)
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      if string.starts_with(line, p)
        println("YES")
      else
        println("NO")
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
when None
  ()
end
